feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S/4 Public Cloud CBC:Event-Based Revenue Recognition Usage 302 for Loss Provision
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to set up EPPM projects revenue recognition to account for 'Onerours contracts' as per IAS 37. Once a project is planned to be in loss, i.e. planned costs > planned revenue, losses should be recognised upfront.

To try to meet this requirement,  in CBC Activity Maintain Settings for Event-Based Revenue Recognition, ID 102530, I am trying to update the assignment rule EPMCCC, sequence 5 to from 301 to use  usage  302 :Asset clearing account for netting with loss provision.

However, in CBC there does not appear to be a way to change the usage for a sequence. I can only change the accounts.  Sequence 5 seems to have the correct accounts used, 21722000, manual reserves for imminent loss and 54442000, Man Adj of Reserves for Imminent Loss. I want to change the usage from 301 to 302.  

Why is  sequence 5 set up with 301 instead of 302? Is there a way to change it?

entry.title: Re: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content: Excellent. NB: SE15 = repository info system = SE84 (I didn't know SE15 used to exist)

entry.title: Re: How can we find which tables contain the field ZZEBELN.
entry.content:
To complete the good answer by @TMRajapaksha here are SE15 / SE84 screenshots (NB: today, Community don't let me paste screenshots in comments, it's why I post an answer):

After clicking the "+" button to display more criteria:

entry.title: Re: How to generate a subroutine pool(MMCP****) in SAP ?
entry.content: Hmm it's what I said: "The generated program has name MMCP5XXX or MMCP6XXX where XXX are the characters 2 to 4 of the corresponding info structure (e.g. S500 -> XXX = 500)."

entry.title: Re: I am creating an IDOC via transaction F110 for the ve...
entry.content: Please don't repeat your question, just edit your question (add an EDIT chapter because many people have already read your question). Also, in general, don't post a question as a solution.

entry.title: Re: I am creating an IDOC via transaction F110 for the vendor , message type PAYEXT. How to debug it
entry.content: Debug may be tricky for unexperimented people. Just to be sure if one exit is called or not, you may use ABAP code at the start of the exit (e.g. MESSAGE x001(00)) to generate a short dump in ST22. You are then sure whether the exit is called or not.

entry.title: Re: How to Access Questions Related to a specific tag on SAP community
entry.content: Already asked here -> https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-do-i-search-for-questions-and-blog-posts-that-have-a-particular-tag/qaq-p/833609

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Landscape configuration
entry.content:
Thank you very much!  The link you sent is extremely helpful, and answered my questions.

Also, if you happen to have any information on how to set up a 3 system landscape for Cloud ALM in a Private Cloud Environment then do please share.

entry.title: KSA eInvoice - DRC - Downpayment for Direct FI Invoice cases from SAP DRC for KSA
entry.content:
How to handle scenarios of downpayment in case of Direct FI Invoice as no link is between DP and Invoice. Clearing has to be performed first to ensure DP is considered from overall Invoice value.

However, eInvoice is created in Real time from SAP DRC, hence it will result in dual reporting to ZATCA.

 

Also does DRC provides useable WHT return for KSA. Need clarity on maturity of the report.

entry.title: No process found for the Consignment with the code: a0000xxx_ordermanagement
entry.content:
hi guys,

when i login backoffice with  a warehousing agent role to check consignment created along with order, shows error msg in backend 

No process found for the Consignment with the code

i want to know why defaultwarehousingshippingservice needs to check consignment process code with "xxx_ordermanagement", there is no such process code, where and when will create one?

please help me with this issue.

thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Which landscape? Community edition?

Are you saying you immediately (within 10 seconds) open the preview and type in the code and it constantly gives you a session timeout message?

entry.title: Re: G/L Account assingment in PS for PR
entry.content: Hey sir, How did you manage to solve such problem? Because I am currently experiencing the same problem.

entry.title: RAP service UI is not working but OData returning response
entry.content:
Hello I created a managed OData service .I exposed the service binding via OData V2-UI . When I launch the OData as a standalone service  , the OData returns data .

But when i preview the application it does not work .But rather it shows error while reaching to the resource favicon.ico

Can somebody help over here

entry.title: SAP Project System - GL Account is Invalid
entry.content:
Hello everyone,


In SAP Project System, in transaction CJ20N, when I assign a material component to an internal activity and choose my material, then I select "L" stock item for this material and I choose the following procurement type to generate a PR: PReq + Reservation for WBS Element. Afterwards, I enter the requirement quantity for this material component and then I hit enter on the keyboard to finalize the creation of this material component. I realize that the GL account assigned to this material automatically changes, from 3090300 to 1211000 and an error is shown which says "GL account 1211000 is invalid". I can't save the progress for my project because when I do there is error in calculating costs since the system saw an error in this material component. What could be the cause of that?

Note: My project stock is maintained as valuated stock in the project profile configuration.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: RAP service UI is not working but OData returning response
entry.content: In the OData preview screenshot there is a TravelID=1 filter. What happens when you remove the filter? In the table settings (gear icon) ensure that at least one column is selected.

entry.title: Re: RAP service UI is not working but OData returning response
entry.content: In the OData preview screenshot there is a TravelID=1 filter. What happens when you remove the filter? In the table settings (gear icon) ensure that at least one column is selected.

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by association' for an existing root entity fails
entry.content: I would recommend to define the action as factory action.

entry.title: Re: Managing Security Roles across S/4HANA Public Cloud a...
entry.content:
Hello,

Its not clear if you are already using GRC? If so and you still like to leverage GRC for these S/4HANA cloud and success factor systems you can adopt IAG Bridge solution, there are some nice blogs in the community but below I find to be helpful

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/iag-bridge-scenario-grc-ac-12-0-integration-with-iag/ba-p/13564421

If still not using GRC, you may think of the IAG as a stand alone solution for your cloud systems. Below is standard documentation from SAP

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_IDENTITY_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE

Regards,

Prana

entry.title: To Pactise PS Exercise
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I want to practise SAP PS Exercise Questions on IDES system . Can anyone please let me know where can I get these documents ?

Thanking you in advance for your support .

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: CPI Post Method with Odata V2 Adapter
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an iFlow with the odata v2 adapter, and the method is POST, but the issue is that when I call the url, it shows an error, but whenever I call the odata url via Postman or Gateway, it is successfully posted.
